| Department Name          | Category            | Total Amount    | Claim Count |
|--------------------------|---------------------|-----------------|-------------|

| IT                      | software            | 10714.76        | 12          |

We are showing only the top records out of a total of 33 records (7 records shown out of a total of 32 - one was "omitted"). The actual total spent on Operations software is 20950.00 USD and the actual total spent on IT software is 10714.76 USD.
